text: Mobile app development offers exciting opportunities for creators. A key principle is responsive design, which ensures an app looks and works well on different screen sizes, from phones to tablets. Developers must choose between building native apps, designed specifically for one platform like iOS or Android, or cross-platform apps, which use a single codebase for both. Native apps often provide better performance and smoother user experiences, while cross-platform options save time and money. Once the app is complete, it is submitted to official app stores like Apple’s App Store or Google Play, where it can reach millions of users after approval and review.
